name: ratel-local
description: Ratel Local gateway plugin for exposing curated upstream MCP tools through search_capabilities and invoke_tool.

interface.shortDescription: Expose upstream MCP servers through the local Ratel gateway
interface.longDescription: Ratel Local lets Codex use one gateway server that searches and invokes tools from configured upstream MCP servers. Use it to keep agent tool surfaces small while preserving access to specialized tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Ratel Local to find the right tool for this task
Import my Codex MCP servers into Ratel
Review my Ratel tool usage and suggest improvements
